name: Groupe Open
summary: Groupe Open engages in digital and industrial transformation business in France, Romania, the Netherlands, and Luxembourg. The company offers consultancy for technology and digital transformation, application management, and DevOps transformation. It is also involved in the project management assistance, design and conception of services, application development, application portfolio management, integrating solution, test and acceptance, continuous deployment and integration, infrastructure management, and user and application support activities, as well as provision of agility, DevOps, and automation services. In addition, the company offers IZBERG,a SaaS platform that manages elements and workflows related to the project; FullMaps, a cartography solution; MoodPeek, a solution for analysing the opinions of mobile users; Swizi, a solution for creating and managing mobile applications; XLoan, a financing solution; Primpromo, a solution for property developers; and Fast-IT technological platform. It serves the banking, insurance, finance, services and transportation, energy, industrial, telecom, media, commerce, and distribution markets, as well as public sector. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Levallois-Perret, France.
